title: Blackspur Large Paraffin Oil Hurricane/Storm Camping Lantern (Colours May Vary)
features: Measures (10") tall and 175mm (7") across at the widest point
Adjustable wick length for a minimum flame of 5mm and a maximum of 25mm
Safe sturdy metal construction with glass covered enclosure
description: 10 Inch lightweight metal paraffin lantern with adjustable flame control. Ideal for camping and outdoor activities.
